description.value: You know the wilderness, its moods, its rhythms, its shortcuts and its warnings. In the right terrain, you move like you belong there.

system.benefits: Choose terrain type (forest, mountains, swamp, etc.). In chosen terrain: difficult terrain doesn't slow travel, Fortune on initiative rolls, Wilderness checks subtract 1 from both dice, enemy ambushes add 1 to both stealth dice
system.notes: Can take multiple times for different terrains
